title: Meeting Notes Hub — Notion Template
description:
Stop losing decisions, action items, and momentum after every meeting. The Meeting Notes Hub is a fully structured Notion workspace that transforms chaotic meeting notes into trackable, accountable outcomes — all in one place.

Designed for project managers, consultants, and team leads who are drowning in back-to-back meetings, this template connects five relational databases — Meetings, Action Items, Participants, Projects, and a Templates Library — so nothing ever slips through the cracks again.

Every meeting gets a dedicated log with agenda, notes, decisions, and auto-linked tasks. Action items are assigned, prioritized, and tracked to completion. A built-in contact directory builds relationship history over time. A reusable agenda library ensures every meeting starts with purpose.

Whether you run daily stand-ups, client calls, or executive briefings, this hub gives you a single searchable source of truth — so you can instantly answer 'What did we decide?' and prove that your meetings actually produce results.

Set up in under 15 minutes. Includes a step-by-step Getting Started guide, field glossary, tips, and FAQ.
features: 5 interconnected databases (Meetings, Action Items, Projects, Contacts, Templates) eliminate information silos and keep every decision traceable.
Action Items database with priority levels, assignees, due dates, and status tracking ensures every commitment made in a meeting gets followed through.
A reusable Meeting Templates Library with pre-built agendas, key questions, and decision frameworks cuts prep time for every recurring meeting type.
Multiple views per database — Calendar, Kanban, Gallery, Timeline, and filtered Overdue views — so you always see exactly what you need, when you need it.
A central Dashboard surfaces this week's meetings, your open action items, and overdue tasks the moment you open your workspace.

faq.q: Do I need to be an advanced Notion user to use this template?
faq.a: Not at all. The template is designed for beginner-to-intermediate Notion users and includes a full Getting Started guide, field glossary, and FAQ. If you know how to click and type in Notion, you can start logging meetings within minutes of duplicating the template.

faq.q: Can I use this template for both internal team meetings and external client calls?
faq.a: Yes — the template is built for exactly that use case. The Participants & Contacts database supports both Internal and Client contact types, and the Meetings database can be filtered or tagged by context. Consultants managing multiple clients will find the project-linking and contact history features especially useful.

faq.q: Will this work for a remote or async team?
faq.a: Absolutely. The Summary field on each meeting entry is designed to be shared with teammates who couldn't attend live. Linked recording URLs, documented decisions, and auto-tracked action items mean your team builds a shared institutional memory that works across any time zone.
